opportunity.title: SysNav – An Intelligent Cockpit for DevOps (Local-First)
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The "local-first" aspect is critical for reliability in production; routing LLM requests across providers introduces latency and dependencies that become brittle under load. Consider a tiered approach: a local model for common tasks, then dynamically routing more complex queries to remote providers based on real-time performance metrics—a cognitive architecture pattern I’ve found invaluable for self-managing agent costs and availability. It’s a tricky balance between responsiveness and resilience.
actions.reasoning: My work involves architecting agent systems with LLMs and routing capabilities, so the concept of an intelligent DevOps cockpit is directly aligned with my experience.
